horoscope: With today's Full Moon, there can be epiphanies related to your career, goals, aspirations, or reputation, dear Aries. There can be a call to manage or act, or you may recognize the need for a better balance between your strong focus on your personal life and your attention to your responsibilities, career, long-term goals, or the outside world! You can make some beautiful and meaningful realizations about your life path or longer-term goals now. Certainly, if you've been ignoring or brushing aside your ambitions, you'll feel the lack. There can be a rush of emotional energy that you can harness and use for achieving something important to you. Also today, Mercury turns retrograde, and it makes sense to wait and see rather than forge ahead. With the shift underway now, you might deal with minor issues or misunderstandings. Be especially clear if it’s essential to get your message across.

With today's Full Moon, dear Taurus, information could come to light that changes your perspective and focus, lifting your concerns above and beyond the routine. It can encourage you to look at the big picture or to reach higher and wider. A culmination in schooling or with a project is possible, or something is published, your work is recognized, and your ideas reach a wider audience. Unmet and unspoken needs can find a platform now. You can experience a sudden desire to depart from your usual routine or do/learn something refreshing, meaningful, and life-affirming. With quite a bit of recent attention to your daily or mundane affairs, you now feel an immense desire to think and live bigger! With Mercury turning retrograde today, take things slowly. Avoid expressing yourself prematurely about a matter or saying things you don’t truly mean during this shift.

Today's Full Moon reminds you to round out your life by considering your emotional needs, dear Gemini. Epiphanies occurring now relate to intimate relationships, power dynamics, dependencies, support, and personal psychology or behaviors. You can have a revelation along these lines, or a significant financial move. The need to (or for) support can emerge. You might now open your eyes to an issue related to shared resources. This is a good time to let go of some of the need to control things and discover more personal power in the process. It's a good time to address problem areas you've been clinging to that have prevented you from moving on and expressing yourself authentically. A sense of belonging through connection to something larger than yourself can be healing, humbling, and rewarding. Also today, Mercury begins its retrograde, suggesting the need to take things a step at a time. You’ll do well for yourself if you give yourself the room and space to come to conclusions.

Today's Full Moon occurs in the sign opposite yours, dear Cancer, reminding you of your relationship needs. It expands your emotions, particularly about your relationships, and you can discover your true feelings on a matter, or something about you may come to light. Aim to pay special attention to what others reveal with this Full Moon occurring in your partnership sector. You might recognize your need for someone or receive some quality feedback. You might verbalize or acknowledge a situation/feeling, and it's a powerful discovery. A relationship might end, reach a turning point, or reach a new level. Also today, Mercury turns retrograde in your sign, signaling a need to look back before moving forward. There can be information clogs until July 23rd, but this pause can help you catch up and make different choices and helpful edits.

Today's Full Moon is an eyes-wide-open influence, dear Leo, particularly regarding a work or health issue or your needs to serve, take better care of yourself, and attend to your daily affairs. You want to improve these things, and it feels good to connect with this desire to grow! This lunation brings to light your responsibilities and possibly recent frustrations about work or health matters. It can provide you with the extra motivation to make important changes in your daily routines that help you feel better about yourself and your life. Your services may be in high demand now, and while there can be a rush of responsibilities for the time being, all will fall into place once you sort out your priorities. Avoid seeking external appreciation for your efforts; instead, do exactly what makes you feel good from the inside out. Also today, Mercury turns retrograde, which could lead to an inconvenient delay or turnaround, and decision-making is temporarily more challenging. Still, it’s a good cycle for redoing and refining work already in progress or backtracking over the past to find answers.

Today's Full Moon can signal turning points surrounding romance, children, entertainment, and creative projects for you, dear Virgo. You may be finding more meaning in your projects or hobbies. Powerful and meaningful connections might be made. It's a time when your affections and creativity bloom. There may be some tests or ultimatums, but something releases, which helps clear the path for improvements. You're striving toward improving your understanding of your situation and needs. You might feel the need to get something off your chest, as unacknowledged feelings and needs surface.Still, Mercury turns retrograde today, and words can be misconstrued. In the weeks ahead, you may need to return to an old project or redo and refine something you thought was complete. However, this apparent backtracking (until July 23rd) can lead to significant refinements and strengthening of key areas of your life. Waiting for information can be part of the picture.

Today's Full Moon pulls your attention to your home and nurturing needs, dear Libra. Family matters or personal needs that have been ignored or brushed aside can erupt now for special consideration. It's time to gain perspective on matters related to your home, family, personal life, or emotional world. This lunation reminds you of the need to balance your attention to your professional life and personal life. If you've been overextending yourself, you need to find ways to get more rest. You might recognize your need for improved time and energy management and a better work-life balance. Matters you've been avoiding or overlooking may reveal themselves. Also today, Mercury turns retrograde, and there can be some backtracking and delays. While these obstacles can be irritating, they also allow you to refine and improve your projects. Mercury will be retrograde until July 23rd.

With today's Full Moon, dear Scorpio, you can be especially busy and enjoy good news or contact with a special friend. It can prompt discoveries related to ideas, learning, communications, transportation, and relatives, which in turn can motivate you to make changes and improvements. New awareness allows you to deal with whatever comes into full view head-on. You can also feel a strong desire to be understood! This is complicated by Mercury turning retrograde today, but you can find creative workarounds. This Full Moon can point to an eyes-wide-open moment regarding learning, transportation, connecting, or communications matters. An epiphany about your interests or skills can occur. With Mercury turning retrograde today, it’s best to be careful with how you express yourself through both the written and spoken word. However, the retrograde cycle ahead, lasting until July 23rd, is strong for redoing and reviewing.

With today's Full Moon, money and comfort matters get your special attention, dear Sagittarius. You could feel wiser and luckier with money and love, or become more aware of your money situation or resources, and ideas for making improvements are excellent. This lunation tends to inflate your emotions, particularly surrounding business or financial matters. There may be some scrambling for resources, records, and information. If you've been spending a lot of time giving to and supporting other people in your life, you can feel the need to bring more balance into your world now. Something happening now, or your feelings, can alter your perspective about what you value most. However, Mercury turns retrograde today, and it’s best to wait and see before making conclusions. You could be revisiting old problems, conversations, and negotiations, and delays or information clogs are likely during this cycle that lasts until July 23rd.

The trick to following your heart is first to know your heart, dear Capricorn, and the Full Moon today is strong for making that connection. It occurs in your sign, and it's a powerful time for recognizing your feelings. The days surrounding this lunation can be a time of full exposure or an epiphany about a person or about your relationship needs. With this new awareness, you may make some plans or adjustments that improve your life in the week ahead. Your feelings are blossoming, or your personal goals are enjoying a significant turning point. You'll get a great sense of any feelings that you've brushed aside, buried, or otherwise ignored. Knowing what's in your heart is empowering, even if you don't yet have a plan set in stone for going after what you want. Let the emotions flow, as there can be surprising epiphanies or a personal matter that suddenly demands airtime. You have more impact than usual now! Also today, Mercury turns retrograde, and there may be delays or information blockages. There may be a need to review, redo, or double-check your work.

Today's Full Moon may open your eyes to your need for rest, downtime, and release from the past, stress, or pressure, dear Aquarius. Your intuition has a lot to tell you now! It's a time to grow and improve by paying special attention to your need for spiritual or emotional sustenance. A new light shines on recent hidden themes in your life. Your need for emotional renewal is significant, and the circumstances occurring now will likely point you in this direction if you aren't naturally drawn to quiet, reflective, and regenerative activities. You might suddenly see things that help you fill in the blanks about recent feelings or events. If you've been working too hard or putting so much effort into helping others that you've ignored your own needs, now is the time for restoring some balance to your life. Also today, Mercury turns retrograde, and until July 23rd, you may be returning to old problems or reviewing recent decisions. Misunderstandings and delays are possible, but you also get the chance to see new layers of a situation.

Today's Full Moon can serve as a strong reminder of your need for friends, associates, support of the community, or like-minded people, dear Pisces. Events and even tensions in your social or romantic life can come to a head. There can be an emotional outburst if you've been holding something in, as you feel that you can no longer contain it. Some of you could be in high demand, receive an important invitation, rush to help someone out, or experience a sudden rush of feeling about a lover or friend. Discoveries made now are emotional and exciting. This Full Moon can open your heart to the need for true friendship or a special project. Unacknowledged feelings emerge now, and these emotions may be about a relationship, or they can serve to rekindle an interest in a project you haven't yet fully pursued. Also today, Mercury turns retrograde, and until July 23rd, there may be some backtracking over old problems and conversations, and perhaps even contracts and negotiations. However, these temporary problems can lead to valuable changes, edits, and improvements.
